description.ko: 유기적이고 생물 발광적인 구조를 통해 빛과 생명의 리드미컬한 교환을 묘사한 AURA-7 호흡계의 매크로 탐구입니다.
description.en: A macro exploration of AURA-7's respiratory system, depicting the rhythmic exchange of light and life through organic, bioluminescent structures.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Respiratory Mycelium of Aether.' A sprawling, pulsating network of #7FB069 emerald moss fibers and #2D5A3D vascular membranes, suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent mist. The central core functions as a biological bellows, rhythmically exhaling clouds of #FFE66D golden bioluminescent spores that swirl like liquid silk. Macro focus on the translucent, semi-permeable textures revealing internal capillary networks of glowing sap. Rendered in Octane, 8k resolution, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh to capture a divine, breathing organic flow.
